content.en:
"Use a lot of eternal decrees to break through the abyss of the demon seed?"

Ye Tian thought about it, it was really possible, but who would do it?

Obtaining an Eternal Order is more difficult and depends on luck, let alone obtaining a large number of Eternal Orders.

Even if he really obtained so many Eternal Decrees, who would be willing to use them to break the abyss of the Demon Seed? Even if he didn't use them to open up the Eternal Realm, he would trade them!

Therefore, this approach is hardly realistic.

"I said, can you let me go?"

This Eternal Realm God Realm Demon Seed asked.

"Okay, let's go!"

Ye Tian waved his hand.

Swish!

This Eternal Realm Divine Realm Demon Seed fled quickly.

He kept running away, and he gradually fled far away.

But suddenly.

A figure stopped him, it was Ye Tian.

"What do you mean?"

The Eternal Realm God Realm Demon Seed roared angrily.

"Stop you!" Ye Tian said with a smile.

"Are you repentant?" the Eternal Realm Demon Seed asked.

"I didn't return!" Ye Tian spread his hands, "You said let me let you go, I let you go, but I let you go, I didn't say that I might arrest you again!"

The 643 Demon Seed of the Eternal Realm God Realm was speechless, and Ye Tian actually played word games with him.

Rumble!!!!

The two sides are fighting again.

Immediately after, Ye Tian's other copy bodies arrived and besieged this Eternal Realm God Realm Demon Seed, killing it in a short time.

......

"What do you want to live?"

Ye Tian said coldly.

If he really let this Eternal Realm God Realm escape, his Eternal Demon Pillar would be exposed, and next time he would definitely attract a large number of Eternal Realm God Realm Demon Seeds.

Therefore, this Eternal Realm Divine Realm Demon Seed must die.

Endless Realms Alliance.

Ye Tian came back, and then entered one of the demon seed abysses, which was also the first demon seed abyss.

This time, he was ready to try it with the Eternal Decree.

That Eternal Realm Demon Seed shouldn't have deceived him, so he was going to give it a try.

Otherwise, if a group of Eternal Realm God Realm Demon Seeds were really attracted over, it would be troublesome.

Thereupon.

He entered the Demon Seed Abyss, and then used the Eternal State Decree to try to open up an eternal kingdom in the Demon Seed Abyss, so as to break through the Demon Seed Abyss.

"Open up!"

Ye Tian urged the Eternal Decree and mobilized the origin of the Eternal Realm to come.

Rumble!!!!

The Demon Seed Abyss began to tremble.

The two forces seem to be clashing, but the Eternal Kingdom Order can't compete with the Demon Seed Abyss at all.

"One Eternal Decree is not enough, the Eternal Decree must be used again!"

Ye Tian took out another Eternal Decree and continued to open up the Eternal Realm to fight against the Demon Seed Abyss.

That's it.

Ye Tian took out one Eternal National Decree after another, and the final result of these Eternal National Decrees was to smash them.

After Ye Tian took out thirteen Eternal Decrees, this Demon Seed Abyss finally collapsed completely.

Click!!

The vast abyss of the demon seed began to disintegrate and crumble, and finally dissipated completely.

Whew!!!

One by one, the Eternal Supreme Dao Realm shuttled over, and when they saw the disappeared demon seed abyss, they were shocked one by one.

They didn't expect that Ye Tian, the ancestor, would actually destroy the Demon Seed Abyss, and none of the Gods Kingdom Alliance would be able to do it in the Half-Step Eternal Realm God Realm, and even the former Lord of the Gods would not be able to do it!

Ye Tian went to the second Demon Seed Abyss again, and continued to use this method to destroy the second Demon Seed Abyss.

So.

As long as the Demon Seed Abyss is born, he will use this way to destroy it.

Although every time he destroys a Demon Seed Abyss, he will lose more than a dozen Eternal Decrees, but he doesn't lack Eternal Decrees at all now, and he doesn't care much at will.

The Endless Realm Alliance needs time to develop now, so he doesn't want to attract too many demon seeds.

These demon seeds are of little value, and it is no good to kill them, so it is natural to avoid them.

Really.

In the years that followed, the CGBC Endless Kingdom Alliance did not attract demon seeds, and passed a long period of stable security.

And Ye Tian also steadily improved his cultivation and solidified the Eternal Dao Species.

Of course.

He didn't relax, and still sent the copy body to inspect the surrounding area to prevent the demon seed from invading the Endless Realm Alliance.

Before you know it, more than two billion years have passed.

During this period of time, the Endless Realm Alliance gave birth to a large number of Eternal Dao Realms, and many Eternal Dao Realms that had cultivated into Eternal Dao Bodies.

And it also gave birth to several powerhouses of the Eternal Dao Body, all of which have enough resources, which can make their cultivation skyrocket.

It's just that there is no perfect-level Eternal Dao Seed, and there is no way to use the treasure of the Tree Heart Demon Seed to improve the Eternal Dao Body, otherwise Ye Tian is really willing to take out the Tree Heart Demon Seed to improve the strength of the human race.

After all, he didn't need the treasure of the Tree Demon Seed now, and his relatives didn't need it now.

Thereupon.

When he was idle and bored, he also used the Tree Heart Demon Seed to study it to see if he could let the high-level Eternal Dao Seed refine the Eternal Dao Body at the lowest cost.

And that's what his research aimed.

After researching again and again, copying other people's bodies again and again for research, Ye Tian finally studied it.

Ye Tian used the Tree Heart Demon Seed as a material, extracted substances from it and then used some special resources to synthesize a special Tree Heart Demon Liquid.

Although the Tree Heart Demon Liquid will also make the Eternal Dao Seed Demon Seed, the side effects are very small, much lower than the side effects of many resource treasures, unless it is to refine a large amount of Tree Heart Demon Liquid, it will be demonized.

Those Eternal Dao realms of the human race are cultivating endless Dao species, and this is a high-level eternal Dao species. 、

Therefore, the Tree Heart Liquid does not do much damage to them, and it can be vigorously promoted.

And so.

Ye Tian made a lot of Tree Heart Mol, and creating the Heart of Tree Liquid would damage the Heart of the Tree Seed, and it would take a lot of resources to restore the Heart of the Tree Seed.

And just like that, the years passed.

Ye Tian had already accumulated enough Tree Heart Magic Liquid to be pushed out for people to exchange.

"With the Tree Heart Demon Liquid, it is estimated that it will not be too long, and the Eternal Dao Realm with a perfect Eternal Dao Body will also be born among the rest of the Terran Race!"

Ye Tian muttered.

......

The Endless Kingdoms Alliance, the Terran Temple.

Many Eternal Dao Realm discovered that the Terran Temple had launched the Tree Heart Magic Liquid, and knowing the introduction of the Tree Heart Demon Liquid, they bought a little one after another to try the effect.

Lin Lei did not lack the Tree Heart Liquid, and he also purchased some Tree Heart Liquid.

After that, he began to retreat to refine the Tree Heart Liquid.

"Effect, great!!!!"

Lin Lei was shocked.

Afterwards, he immediately went to buy more Tree Heart Liquid.

However, the other Eternal Dao realms also knew the effect of the Tree Heart Magic Liquid, and they were all frantically exchanging it.

In a short period of time, the Tree Heart Liquid was redeemed.
